text:
Created attachment 241944
build log, xz compressed

had to compress, full log was 3.5 megs. Def gdal issue, see line 9888 where the fun really starts, the whole r. modules cannot figure out how to interface with gdal. Many lines ahead showing errors or illegal instructions, not sure if those are expected or not.

gdal has this set some may be defaults I carried into my portconf settings
Options Set=
CFITSIO TILEDB POPPLER DODS EXR PCRE CRYPTOPP CURL ECW EXPAT FREEXL GEOS GTA HDF5 KML LIBXML2 NETCDF ODBC OPENJPEG PGSQL SFCGAL SPATIALITE SQLITE WEBP XERCES ZSTD


which by culling I think this is what I added, though noticing by default gdal is using PCRE2, so I will rebuild gdal with that instead of PCRE and see if it makes a difference at all in the result.
CFITSIO TILEDB POPPLER DODS EXR PCRE CRYPTOPP  ECW GTA ODBC OPENJPEG
